task: #src/agent.rs run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in #src/config.rs #src/tui/config_view.rs

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_output field to Profile config
steps.instruction:
In src/config.rs:24 (Profile struct), add field `pub cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>` after line 44 (cost_per_mtok_input). Add serde default attribute.

steps.description: Calculate and send cost in UiEvent::TokenStats
steps.instruction:
In src/agent.rs:281-293, calculate cost: input_cost = total_input_tokens as f64 * config.cost_per_mtok_input / 1_000_000.0 (similar for output). Update the UiEvent::TokenStats at line 287 to include total_cost field.

steps.instruction:

steps.description: Display cost in TUI stats view
steps.instruction:
In src/tui/stats_view.rs (if exists) or src/tui/mod.rs, find where TokenStats is handled for display. Add cost rendering next to the token counts. If stats_view.rs doesn't exist, find the draw/render function that displays token stats.
